description: eslint.config.js has n/hashbang: off override for scripts/bin/**
yarn lint passes on a file with #!/usr/bin/env node in scripts/bin/
formatMessage keeps the subject line intact regardless of length
steps: Call formatMessage with a subject line longer than 72 characters
Verify the subject line is returned on a single line, unmodified
Verify no newline is inserted within the subject

description: formatMessage wraps body lines at 72 characters on word boundaries
steps: Call formatMessage with a body line that exceeds 72 characters
Verify no output line after the subject exceeds 72 characters
Verify wrapping occurs at a word boundary, not mid-word

description: formatMessage preserves the blank line between subject and body
steps: Call formatMessage with a subject, blank line, and body
Verify the second line of output is empty
Verify the body starts on the third line

description: formatMessage does not wrap body lines that are already short
steps: Call formatMessage with a body whose lines are all under 72 characters
Verify the output body is identical to the input body
